title: erigeron lepidopodus
intro: Erigeron lepidopodus, also known as the fleabane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The medicinal properties of Erigeron lepidopodus also have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
